reviews.review_msg: Two good things about Avenlino: 1.) He has a wealth of personal experience which he relates to the topics we discuss in class 2.)He is very helpful - he will meet you more than half way. One bad thing: I can understand why for some his Brazilian accent may be a problem. However, I didn't have this problem myself.
Prof. Ali is very helpful and approachable. She tries to make the course interesting, although the content can be dry. Study notes and textbook and you will be ok.

She is one of my favourite profs! You can learn a lot from going to her lectures because her powerpoints are very relevant and she is very easy to understand. She is helpful during her office hours and she knows her materials well! Tutorial questions and readings help a lot. I would take all the classes she taught!
